title: Text colored
description: It changes the plain white text to color, where it is missing.
body:
**Text Colored** - resource pack that makes the Minecraft interface more intuitive. Colored text helps you navigate faster: green (✅"**ON**") and red (❌"**OFF**") are instantly readable, while the rest of the elements are colored for better navigation. Comfort and style in every detail!

![VIsible_button](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3642f9830b76a9a25165b62aa22a33f6282695c0.png)

![Done](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/741ab473bc3bfb262424ac730f29295c0f71a8be.png)

![Example "Video Settings"](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/be5d06ba769ecef18828dbe0042fdbd0635f72da_0.webp)
